titleStmt.title: SII 38.376: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 376. (A.R. No. 376 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall, second prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Achyutadēva Mahārāya Year: Sāṟvani, Māśi 14.

summary.p: Records that Mallappa-Nāyakkar and Sēvvappa-Nāyakkar appointed certain Bhagavāṉ Kōvaraṉ, son of Viḷattarkōṉ, a shepherd of Kaṇiyaṉūr, as shepherd (tiruviḷakkukuḍi) to supply three kuṟuṇi of ghee by the śūlakkāl measure (for burning lamps) in the temple of the god Tirumalar-uḍaiya tambiṟāṉār of Dēvakkāpuram, on the occasion of Kārttigai, in order to secure merit of the king Achyutadēva Mahārāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cāṟuvari varuṣam māci mātam 10 4kku śrīmat Accutatevamakārāyaṟku puṇṇiyamāka mallappanāyakkar
Ayyaṉum cevvappanāyakkar Ayyaṉum tevakkāpuram tirumalar Uṭaiya tampirāṉāṟku tiruviḷakkukuṭi Āka kalavai
ppaṟṟu Iṭattuṟaikku vācapaṭi cantiraṉukku Iṟuttiṟkuṭi kaṇiyaṉūr maṉṟāṭi viḷattakkoṉ makaṉ pakavāṉ
kovaraṉ tiruviḷakkum Āka niṟceyittu Aḷakkum neyi� Inta neyi mukkuṟuṇiyum cūlakkālile tirukkoyilukku
tirukkāttikaikku Aḷantu (cu) cukattile kuṭiirukka kaṭaivar Ākavum Inta taṉmam mallappanāyakkar Ayyaṉ
cevvappaayyaṉ taṉmaāka naṭakkakaṭaivar Ākavum Inta taṉmattukku Iyātoruvar Akutam(pa) paṇṇiṉa (te) Uṇṭāṉāl
keṅkaikkaraiyile kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭaivar Ākavum §
Digital edition of SII 38.376 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
